hooks.command: echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\.env' && echo 'BLOCKED: edit .env.local manually' && exit 1 || exit 0

echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'types/database\.ts' && echo 'BLOCKED: types/database.ts is auto-generated. Run: npx supabase gen types typescript --project-id fwdhnipekbmeqozkpfyh > types/database.ts' && exit 1 || exit 0
echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '"(app|lib|types|hooks|components)/' && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -30 || exit 0
